Component.Name: CurrCodeEdit
Component.Caption: C(CurrCodeStatic)
Component.DefaultFrom: CustomerCurrency(, ExchRate, FixedRate, CustNum, CurAllowOver, CurpAllowOver,CurrCode,OrderDate)

Component.Name: CurrCodeGridCol
Component.DefaultFrom: CustomerCurrency(, ExchRate, FixedRate, CustNum, CurAllowOver, CurpAllowOver,CurrCode,OrderDate)

Component.Name: CustNumEdit
Component.Caption: C(CustNumStatic)
Component.DefaultFrom: CustNumForCOBillTo(BillToName, , , , , , , , , , , Cur0AmtFormat, , , ExportType, BillToCountry, , DefaultShipTo, P(CustNum))

Component.Name: CustNumGridCol
Component.DefaultFrom: CustNumForCOBillTo(BillToName, , , , , , , , , , , Cur0AmtFormat, , , ExportType, BillToCountry, , DefaultShipTo, P(CustNum), MXElectronicInvUsage, MXPaymentType)

Component.Name: CustomerEdit
Component.DefaultFrom: CustNumForCOBillTo(BillToName, , , , , , , , , , , Cur0AmtFormat, , , ExportType, BillToCountry, , DefaultShipTo, P(CustNum), MXElectronicInvUsage, MXPaymentType)

Component.Name: CustomerFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 13; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 51; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0.25,0,0,0) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

Component.Name: CustSeqEdit
Component.Caption: C(CustSeqStatic)
Component.DefaultFrom: CustSeqCOAddr(CustNum, CadrName, , , , , , , , ExportType, , CoShipToAddr_1, CoShipToAddr_2, CoShipToAddr_3, CoShipToAddr_4, CoShipToCity, CoShipToCountry, CoShipToName, CoShipToState, CoShipToZip)

Component.Name: CustSeqGridCol
Component.Validators: COShipToAddrDetails(CustNum,CadrName,,,,,,,,ExportType,,CoShipToAddr_1, CoShipToAddr_2, CoShipToAddr_3, CoShipToAddr_4, CoShipToCity, CoShipToCountry, CoShipToName, CoShipToState, CoShipToZip),GetExportType,CustSeqAllowChange,Ask(PromptMsg, PromptButtons,),GenerateEventWithMessage(PromoCodeValidate)
Component.DefaultFrom: CustSeqCOAddr(CustNum, CadrName, , , , , , , , ExportType, , CoShipToAddr_1, CoShipToAddr_2, CoShipToAddr_3, CoShipToAddr_4, CoShipToCity, CoShipToCountry, CoShipToName, CoShipToState, CoShipToZip)

Component.Name: DetailFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 106; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Center; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(ButtonBarVisible) = 1; ANIM: FromRight; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: HeaderFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 20; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0.3,0.625,0.17) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 64; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0.17,0.17) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 16; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN7; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0) TARGET(UNKNOWN0)

Component.Name: MainFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 15fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 85fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: OrderFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 19; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

Component.Name: PLDocumentTypeGridCol
Component.MaintainFromSpec: UserDefinedTypeValues( PROPERTY(Value) FILTER(TypeName = 'Typ dokumentu') SETVARVALUES(TypeName = 'Typ dokumentu') )

Component.Name: ShipToEdit
Component.Validators: COShipToAddrDetails(CustNum,CadrName,,,,,,,,ExportType,,CoShipToAddr_1, CoShipToAddr_2, CoShipToAddr_3, CoShipToAddr_4, CoShipToCity, CoShipToCountry, CoShipToName, CoShipToState, CoShipToZip),GetExportType,CustSeqAllowChange,Ask(PromptMsg, PromptButtons,),GenerateEventWithMessage(PromoCodeValidate)
Component.DefaultFrom: CustSeqCOAddr(CustNum, CadrName, , , , , , , , ExportType, , CoShipToAddr_1, CoShipToAddr_2, CoShipToAddr_3, CoShipToAddr_4, CoShipToCity, CoShipToCountry, CoShipToName, CoShipToState, CoShipToZip)

Component.Name: ShpToFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 13; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 51; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0.25,0,0,0) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

EventHandler.Name: CopyConfig
EventHandler.Response: SLCfgMains.CfgCopyConfigSp( PARMS(VAR P(UbSourceConfigID), VAR P(CoNum), VAR 0, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: CustNumChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCos.CoCustomerValid2Sp( V(ehm1_CustNumChanged1) V(ehm2_CustNumChanged1) V(ehm3_CustNumChanged1) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CustNumChanged
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_CustNumChanged_7 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.ParentFormName = "" Then ThisForm.GenerateEvent("CustPoChanged") End if ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: CustNumChangedXX
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCos.CoGetOrderActivitySp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CustNum), MESSAGE) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CustPoWarning_Client
EventHandler.Response: MsgApp(Clear, Prompt, SuccessFailure, mI=ExistFor=, STRINGS(sOrder), STRINGS(sCustPO), PV(CustPo))

EventHandler.Name: CustPoWarning_DB
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCos.CustPoExistsWarningSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CustPo), VAR P(CustNum), MESSAGE) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CustPoWarning_DB
EventHandler.Response: FSP.FSSROs.SSSFSSROCustPoExistsWarningSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CustPo), VAR P(CustNum), MESSAGE) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CustSeqChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCos.CoCustSeqValidSp( PARMS(VAR P(CustNum), VAR P(CustSeq), RVAR P(UbFormatCoShipToAddress), RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(ShipCode), RVAR P(ShipPartial), RVAR P(ShipEarly), RVAR P(Slsman), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(ShipToContact_2), RVAR P(ShipToPhone_2), MESSAGE, RVAR P(ShipHold)) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetCoCompEnableFlags
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCos.GetCoCompEnableFlags( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CustNum), VAR V(vUseExchRate), RVAR V(vEdiOrder), RVAR V(vLcrRequired), RVAR V(vEnableOrderType), RVAR V(vEnableConsolidate), RVAR V(vEnableEffExpDate)) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchConfigUI
EventHandler.Response: SLCfgMains.HandleDocumentAuto( PARMS(VAR P(ConfigId), VAR P(RowPointer), VAR CO, VAR SyteLineDocument, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchWebConfig
EventHandler.Response: Configuration( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(WebURL=V(WebURL), ApplID=V(ApplID), OrderType=V(OrderType), Key1=V(Key1), Key2=V(Key2), ConfigID=V(ConfigID), Reconfiguration=V(Reconfiguration), JobFlag=V(JobFlag), ApplIDShipSite=V(ApplIDShipSite), ConfigWebUrl=V(ConfigWebUrl), CEP=V(CEP), Job=V(Job), Suffix=V(Suffix), XRefFlag=V(XRefFlag), CfgSource=V(CfgSource), ShipSite=V(ShipSite), AutoJob=V(AutoJob), PartNumber=V(PartNumber), sQty=V(QtyOrderedConv), sUOM=PV(UM), sPartNumber=V(sPartNumber), sP
EventHandler.Response2: arentConfigId=V(sParentConfigId), sNameSpace=V(sNameSpace), sGroupName=V(sGroupName), sCurrencyCode=P(AdrCurrCode), IsPending=V(IsPending), sCoOrigSite=V(sCoOrigSite)) )

EventHandler.Name: LinkToBlanketLines
EventHandler.Response: CustomerOrderBlanketLines( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum) RLACS() SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(CoStat=P(Stat), CurrCode=P(CurrCode), CoPricecode=P(Pricecode), PcoDescription=P(PricecodeDesc), CoOrigSite=P(OrigSite), CoExchRate=P(ExchRate), CadrName=P(BillToName), CoCustNum=P(CustNum), CoOrderDate=P(OrderDate), CoEffDate=P(EffDate), CoExpDate=P(ExpDate), CurrCstPrcFormat=P(Cur0CstPrcFormat), CadrCreditHoldVar=P(CoCreditHold), WhseVar=P(Whse)) )

EventHandler.Name: LinkToOrderLines
EventHandler.Response: CustomerOrderLines( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum) RLACS() SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(CoOrigSiteVar=P(OrigSite), CoStatVar=P(Stat), CurrCodeVar=P(CurrCode), AdrNameVar=P(BillToName), OrderDateVar=P(OrderDate), CoTypeVar = P(Type), CustNumVar =P(CustNum), CreditHoldVar = P(CreditHold), WhseVar=P(Whse), AdrCreditHoldVar=P(CoCreditHold), ConsignmentVar=P(Consignment), CustSeqVar=P(CustSeq)) )

EventHandler.Name: LinkToRateShoppingForm
EventHandler.Response: RateShopping( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() POPUP() SETVARVALUES(CustomerOrderVar=P(CoNum), TransactionTypeVar=CO, CustNumVar=P(CustNum), CustSeqVar=P(CustSeq), ShipViaVar=P(ShipCode), ShipmentCoCurrCodeVar=P(CurrCode), ReturnValueEventVar=ApplyRateShoppingValues) )

EventHandler.Name: LinkToTranslateCurrency
EventHandler.Response: CustomerOrdersDomesticCurrency( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(PrepaidAmt = P(PrepaidAmt), Freight = P(Freight), MiscCharges = P(MiscCharges), PrepaidT = P(PrepaidT), FreightT = P(FreightT), MChargesT = P(MChargesT), SalesTaxT = P(SalesTaxT), SalesTaxT2 = P(SalesTaxT2), SalesTax = P(SalesTax), SalesTax2 = P(SalesTax2), Price = P(Price), CoNum = P(CoNum), CustNum = P(CustNum), CadrName=P(BillToName), CurrCode = P(CurrCode), DomTRate = P(ExchRate), DomPossibleDate = P(OrderDate)) )

EventHandler.Name: ListEstimatedCharges
EventHandler.Response: EstimatedTotalCharges( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(PTable=co_all, PSite=V(Parm_Site), PCoNum=P(CoNum), PCalcTax=1) )

EventHandler.Name: LoadDIFOTDefault
EventHandler.Response: SLCos.GetDIFOTPolicySp( PARMS(VAR , VAR P(CoNum), VAR , VAR , VAR P(CustNum), VAR P(CustSeq), VAR 3, RVAR P(ShippedOverOrderedQtyTolerance), RVAR P(ShippedUnderOrderedQtyTolerance), RVAR P(DaysShippedAfterDueDateTolerance), RVAR P(DaysShippedBeforeDueDateTolerance)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: PromoCodeValidate
EventHandler.Response: SLCos.COPromotionCodeValidSp( PARMS(VAR P(Slsman), VAR P(CustNum), VAR P(EndUserType), VAR P(OrderDate), VAR P(CurrCode), VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CustSeq), VAR P(CorpCust), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ReserveOrder
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCos.ResvCoSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: RunCustomerOrderBlanketLineReleases
EventHandler.Response: BlanketReleases( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum) RLACS() SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(AdrName=P(BillToName), AdrCreditHoldVar=P(CoCreditHold), CoCoOrigSiteVar=P(OrigSite), ConsignmentVar=P(Consignment)) )

EventHandler.Name: ShipMethodDataChange
EventHandler.Response: SLCos.CalcUpdCOFreightChargeSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(ShipMethod), RVAR P(Freight), VAR CO, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: SSSCCIRunPaymentInformation
EventHandler.Response: CreditCardPayments( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(CustNum=P(CustNum), RefNum=P(CoNum), TransType=A, Total=1, ProcessButtonLabel=sSSSCCIAuth, RefType=O, RefTypeNoSro=O, ShipMethod=P(ShipMethod), CusLangCode=P(CusLangCode)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormCopyCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SETPROPVALUES(PrepaidT=0, FreightT=0, MChargesT=0, SalesTaxT=0, SalesTaxT2=0, OrigSite=V(Parm_Site))

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.UserNames.CanAny( PARMS(VAR Credit Field Update, VAR , RVAR V(CanUpdateCreditField)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormSaveCompleted
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.GetVariableSp( PARMS(VAR SumCoSpMaxCoDisc, VAR , VAR 1, RVAR V(CoNumList), MESSAGE) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectNewCompleted
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_StdObjectNewCompleted_2 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.ParentFormName <> "" Then ThisForm.GenerateEvent("CustNumChanged") End If
ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR CustomerOrders, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: ToggleButtonBar
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace Mongoose.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_ToggleButtonBar_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Value = "1" Then ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").SetValue("0") Else ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Set
EventHandler.Response2: Value("1") End If ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: UpdateExchangeRate
EventHandler.Response: SLArinvs.GetCustExchRateSp( PARMS(VAR P(CustNum), VAR P(CurrCode), VAR P(OrderDate), RVAR P(ExchRate), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ValidateCOConsignment
EventHandler.Response: SLCos.ValidateCOConsignValuesSp( PARMS(VAR P(CustNum), VAR P(CustSeq), VAR P(Whse), VAR P(Consignment), VAR P(CoNum), RVAR V(ConsignableOrder), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: VTXCalculateTax
EventHandler.Response: TaxInterfaceParms.SSSVTXCalcCoTaxSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0BlanketOrderTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLCoBlns) OBJNAME(sTree_COform_BlnkLine) PROPERTIES(CoNum, CoLine, Item, Description, BlanketQtyConv) FILTER(CoNum = 'P(CoNum)'))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0DetailTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLCoitems) PROPERTIES(CoLine, Item, ItDescription, QtyOrderedConv, DueDate))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0RegularOrderTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLCoitems) OBJNAME(sTree_COform_RegLine) PROPERTIES(CoNum, CoLine, CoRelease, Item, Description, QtyOrderedConv, DerQtyShippedConv, DerQtyReturnedConv, DueDate) FILTER(CoNum = FP(CoNum)))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1BlanketOrderTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLCoitems) OBJNAME(sTree_COform_BlnkRel) PROPERTIES(CoNum, CoLine, CoRelease, QtyOrderedConv, DerQtyShippedConv, DerQtyReturnedConv, DueDate) LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum,CoLine=CoLine))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1DetailTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLCoShips) OBJNAME() PROPERTIES(ShipDate, DerQtyShippedConv, DerQtyReturnedConv))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1RegularOrderTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLCoShips) OBJNAME(sTree_COform_RegShip) PROPERTIES(CoNum, CoLine, CoRelease, DateSeq, ShipDate, DerQtyShippedConv, DerQtyReturnedConv) LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum,CoLine=CoLine,CoRelease=CoRelease))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL2BlanketOrderTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL2( OBJ(SLCoShips) OBJNAME(sTree_COform_BlnkShip) PROPERTIES(CoNum, CoLine, CoRelease, DateSeq, ShipDate, DerQtyShippedConv, DerQtyReturnedConv) LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum,CoLine=CoLine,CoRelease=CoRelease))

Variable.Name: ehm1_CustNumChanged1
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR V(ValidCustNum), VAR P(RowPointer), VAR P(OrderDate), RVAR P(ExchRate), RVAR P(CustNum), RVAR P(CustSeq), RVAR V(ShipmentExists), RVAR P(UbFormatCoBillToAddress), RVAR P(UbFormatCoShipToAddress), RVAR P(Contact), RVAR P(Phone), RVAR P(BillToContact_3), RVAR P(BillToPhone_3), RVAR P(ShipToContact_2), RVAR P(ShipToPhone_2), RVAR P(CorpCust), RVAR P(Cad01Name), RVAR P(Cus01Contact_3), RVAR P(Cus01Phone_3), RVAR P(Cad0CorpAddress), RVAR P(CurrCode), RVAR P(UseExchRate), RVAR
Variable.Value2: P(Whse), RVAR P(ShipCode), RVAR P(ShipCodeDesc), RVAR P(ShipPartial), RVAR P(ShipEarly), RVAR P(Consolidate), RVAR P(Summarize), RVAR P(InvFreq), RVAR, RVAR P(TermsCode), RVAR P(TermsCodeDesc), RVAR P(Slsman), RVAR P(Pricecode),)

Variable.Name: ehm2_CustNumChanged1
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(PricecodeDesc), RVAR P(EndUserType), RVAR P(EndUserTypeDesc), RVAR P(ApsPullUp), VAR V(TaxCodeType1Hdr), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(TaxCode1Desc), VAR V(TaxCodeType2Hdr), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(TaxCode2Desc), VAR V(TaxCodeType1Line), RVAR P(FrtTaxCode1), RVAR P(FrtTaxCode1Desc), VAR V(TaxCodeType2Line), RVAR P(FrtTaxCode2), RVAR P(FrtTaxCode2Desc), VAR V(TaxCodeType1Line), RVAR P(MscTaxCode1), RVAR P(MscTaxCode1Desc), VAR V(TaxCodeType2Line), RVAR P(MscTaxCode2), RVAR P(MscTaxCode
Variable.Value2: 2Desc), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TransNat2), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(CusLcrReqd), RVAR P(CusUseExchRate), RVAR P(CoCreditHold), MESSAGE, RVAR P(CoShipmentApprovalRequired), RVAR P(ShipHold), RVAR P(CurAllowOver),)

Variable.Name: ehm3_CustNumChanged1
Variable.Value: PARMS3( RVAR P(CurpAllowOver), RVAR P(IncludeTaxInPrice), VAR P(Consignment), RVAR V(ConsignableOrder), RVAR P(ShippedOverOrderedQtyTolerance), RVAR P(ShippedUnderOrderedQtyTolerance), RVAR P(DaysShippedAfterDueDateTolerance), RVAR P(DaysShippedBeforeDueDateTolerance), RVAR V(vEdiOrder), RVAR V(vLcrRequired), RVAR V(vEnableOrderType), RVAR V(vEnableConsolidate), RVAR V(vEnableEffExpDate), VAR P(OrderDate))

Variable.Name: OppIdFilterCCVar
Variable.Value: FILTER(CustNum = ISNULL(FP(CustNum), CHAR(1)) AND ISNULL(FP(LeadId), ISNULL(Lead, ' ')) = ISNULL(Lead, ' ') ) SETVARVALUES(DefCustNum = P(CustNum))

Variable.Name: OppIdFilterPermCCVar
Variable.Value: FILTERPERM(CustNum = ISNULL(FP(CustNum), CHAR(1)) AND ISNULL(FP(LeadId), ISNULL(Lead, ' ')) = ISNULL(Lead, ' ') )

Variable.Name: OppIdFilterVar
Variable.Value: FILTER((FP(CustNum) = CustNum) and ISNULL(FP(LeadId), ISNULL(Lead, ' ')) = ISNULL(Lead, ' '))

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: If oldTaxCode1 <> newTaxCode1 And isIncludeTaxInPrice = "1" And isInvoiced = "1" Then
If oldTaxCode2 <> newTaxCode2 And isIncludeTaxInPrice = "1" And isInvoiced = "1" Then
' Only originating sites can change the status.
'I believe there's no need to check for new record here
' Initial values for the flags taken from the GetCoCompEnableFlagsSp code.
' This logic was taken from the GetCoCompEnableFlagsSp, which now does not
' need to be called if there is not yet a customer order number.
If CustomerUseExchRate = UseExchRate And UseExchRate <> "" Then
If bSetEnabled And ThisForm.Variables("vEdiOrder").Value = "0" And CBool(ThisForm.Variables("vEnableConsolidate").Value) Then
'To find Tax System Enabled/Disabled - used to display Tax Amounts labels & components
'Tax System 1: Set Tax Code type for Tax System = 1, at
' Line level(Lines, Freight, Misc Charges Tax codes)
'Tax System 2: Set Tax Code type for Tax System = 2, at
' Line level(Lines, Freight, Misc Charges Tax codes)
' *** Set CTP button caption: depends on APS mode
'Set CustNum/CustSeq variables to current property values
'If CreditHold changes, default all related fields
'Determines whether CustNum has been changed from previous
'value and is non-empty. Used to control whether down-stream
If TestCustNum = "" Or ValidCustNum = TestCustNum Then
'Determines whether CustSeq has been changed from previous
'value and is non-empty. Used to control whether down-stream
If TestCustSeq = "" Or ValidCustSeq = TestCustSeq Then
'event to link to the appropriate Lines form.
'Refresh collection if the Refresh Flag is set on.
Sub SetOrderCreditHoldFlag(Optional ByVal strCreditHold As String = "0")
'Check for PO Exists in both unsaved client records and in
Sub CheckPoExistsWarning(Optional ByVal strCoNum As String = "")
' If there is no customer PO #, then there is no checking for it needed.
Do While i <= oCache.GetNumEntries - 1 And Not bWarningGiven
' If ThisForm.ParentFormName = "" Or (ThisForm.ParentFormName <> "" And ThisForm.Components("CustomerEdit").Text <> "") Then
If ThisForm.ParentFormName = "" Or (ThisForm.ParentFormName <> "" And ThisForm.Components("CustomerEdit").Text <> "") Then
' Defaults that do not do anything are set as validated on new record.
If Not (ThisForm.Components("TaxCode1Edit").Required = True And ThisForm.Components("TaxCode1Edit").Text = "") Then
If Not (ThisForm.Components("TaxCode2Edit").Required = True And ThisForm.Components("TaxCode2Edit").Text = "") Then
If (Application.Variables("Parm_EcReporting").GetValueOfInteger(0) = 1 And CoStatus <> "C" And CoStatus <> "H") Or
(Application.Variables("Avail_MX").GetValueOfInteger(0) = 1 And Application.Variables("IsCSIB_97762ActiveVar").GetValueOfInteger(0) = 1 And CoStatus <> "C" And CoStatus <> "H") Then
